operating_ranges.evidence: It takes approximately 12 minutes to complete the entire process
Press and hold the rinse (1) button for 3 s to run automatic cleaning

degradation_mechanisms.evidence: Regular cleaning is mandatory in order to ensure problem-free operation of the machine and to ensure optimum coffee quality
If care and cleaning of the machine is not carried out properly, dispensing milk beverages will constitute a food hygiene hazard point

fault_conditions.name: cleaning_required_lockout
fault_conditions.description: Machine prevents drink preparation when cleaning is required
fault_conditions.symptoms: not possible to make a drink unless cleaning is performed
fault_conditions.evidence: if cancelled and depending on settings, it will not be possible to make a drink unless cleaning is performed

maintenance_actions.name: automatic_system_cleaning_eversys_cleaning_ball
maintenance_actions.evidence: Automatic system cleaning Eversys cleaning ball™ [87] - Daily (auto)

maintenance_actions.name: visual_inspection_cleaning_balls_dispensers
maintenance_actions.evidence: Visual inspection cleaning balls dispensers on Légacy [87] - Or as required

maintenance_actions.name: milk_tank_cleaning
maintenance_actions.evidence: Milk tank and milk fridge [95] (machine option) - Daily (auto)

assumptions.statement: Cleaning operations are automatically logged by the system
assumptions.reason: Manual states 'All automatic cleaning operations are logged' but does not specify logging mechanism details

assumptions.statement: EvercleanTM and Eversys cleaning ballTM are the standard cleaning agents
assumptions.reason: Manual identifies these as proprietary cleaning products but does not specify chemical composition or alternative products
